title: Transfer Pricing Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for optimizing intercompany transfer prices based on cost, market, and regulatory constraints, incorporating lean and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Production Cost per Unit (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Direct manufacturing cost per unit (materials, labor, overhead) at the producing entity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct manufacturing cost per unit (materials, labor, overhead) at the producing entity.

inputs.label: Market Price per Unit (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Arm's length market price for comparable uncontrolled transactions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Arm's length market price for comparable uncontrolled transactions.

inputs.label: Transaction Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units transferred between entities in the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units transferred between entities in the period.

inputs.label: Producer Entity Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate of the producing entity's jurisdiction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective corporate tax rate of the producing entity's jurisdiction.

inputs.label: Distributor Entity Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate of the distributing entity's jurisdiction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective corporate tax rate of the distributing entity's jurisdiction.

inputs.label: Current Transfer Price (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Existing transfer price used for intercompany transactions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Existing transfer price used for intercompany transactions.

inputs.label: Compliance Risk Tolerance (Low/Medium/High)
inputs.businessContext: Company's appetite for audit risk; Low = tight arm's length range, High = wider range.

businessContext_i18n.en: Company's appetite for audit risk; Low = tight arm's length range, High = wider range.

inputs.label: Include Lean Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a waste reduction factor (muda) to production cost based on Six Sigma process capability.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a waste reduction factor (muda) to production cost based on Six Sigma process capability.

rules.message: Production cost must be less than market price for positive margin.
Current transfer price should be between production cost and market price.
Transaction volume must be greater than zero.
Low risk tolerance requires the arm's length range to be within 15% of market price.

thresholds.alert: Distributor margin below 10% – potential profit shifting red flag.
Tax savings exceed 5% of revenue – may attract regulatory scrutiny.
Lean waste factor adjustment exceeds $5/unit – consider process improvement.

formulas.label: Adjusted Production Cost (Lean)
formulas.description: Production cost reduced by a lean waste factor (10% if Six Sigma process sigma < 3, else 0).

formulas.label: Arm's Length Range Lower Bound
formulas.description: Lower bound of acceptable transfer price based on cost-plus method (cost + 5% markup).

formulas.label: Arm's Length Range Upper Bound
formulas.description: Upper bound based on resale price method (market price minus 10% distributor margin).

formulas.label: Optimal Transfer Price
formulas.description: Weighted average of cost-plus and resale price, adjusted for tax differential and risk tolerance.
formulas.formula: CASE compliance_risk_tolerance WHEN 'Low' THEN (arm_length_range_lower + arm_length_range_upper)/2 WHEN 'Medium' THEN (arm_length_range_lower * 0.4 + arm_length_range_upper * 0.6) WHEN 'High' THEN (arm_length_range_lower * 0.3 + arm_length_range_upper * 0.7) END

formulas.label: Total Tax Savings
formulas.description: Tax savings from shifting profit to lower-tax entity using optimal transfer price vs. current.

formulas.label: Net Profit Shift
formulas.description: Profit shifted from distributor to producer (positive = shift to producer).

formulas.label: Adjusted Net Benefit (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Total benefit after tax savings minus compliance risk penalty (5% of profit shift if risk tolerance is Low).
formulas.formula: total_tax_savings - (CASE compliance_risk_tolerance WHEN 'Low' THEN ABS(net_profit_shift)*0.05 ELSE 0 END)

primary.label: Adjusted Net Benefit
primary.description: Primary result: total tax savings minus compliance risk penalty.

adjusted_production_cost.label: Adjusted Production Cost
adjusted_production_cost.description: Production cost after lean waste adjustment.

arm_length_range_lower.label: Arm's Length Lower Bound
arm_length_range_lower.description: Lower bound of acceptable transfer price.

arm_length_range_upper.label: Arm's Length Upper Bound
arm_length_range_upper.description: Upper bound of acceptable transfer price.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excessive Waste in Production
hiddenLossDrivers.description: If include_lean_waste_factor is true and production cost > 20% above industry benchmark, hidden loss from inefficiency.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Tax Rate Disparity Underutilized
hiddenLossDrivers.description: If tax rate difference > 10% but optimal transfer price is not at extreme of arm's length range, potential savings missed.
hiddenLossDrivers.condition: ABS(tax_rate_producer - tax_rate_distributor) > 10 AND optimal_transfer_price NOT IN (arm_length_range_lower, arm_length_range_upper)

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Compliance Risk Penalty Eroding Benefit
hiddenLossDrivers.description: If compliance_risk_tolerance is Low and net_profit_shift > 0, penalty reduces net benefit.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Lean Six Sigma to reduce production cost
suggestedActions.description: Target a 10% reduction in production cost through waste elimination to widen arm's length range.

suggestedActions.label: Adjust transfer price to optimal level
suggestedActions.description: Move from current transfer price to optimal transfer price to maximize tax savings.

suggestedActions.label: Review compliance risk tolerance policy
suggestedActions.description: If tax savings are significant, consider increasing risk tolerance to avoid penalty.

suggestedActions.label: Document arm's length analysis thoroughly
suggestedActions.description: Prepare OECD-compliant documentation to support transfer price adjustment.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Net Benefit
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Primary result multiplied by a confidence factor (0.85) to account for estimation uncertainty.
